include-in-header.text:
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Merriweather:ital,opsz,wght@0,18..144,300..900;1,18..144,300..900&family=Nunito+Sans:ital,opsz,wdth,wght,YTLC@0,6..12,75..125,200..1000,440..540;1,6..12,75..125,200..1000,440..540&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  /* --- BLOG-ONLY STYLING --- */
  /* These rules ONLY apply when 'body-classes: blog-page' is in the .qmd file */

  /* 1. Targets 'NeurIPS 2025' on the BLOG LISTING page */
  .blog-page .listing-subtitle,
  .blog-page .quarto-post .body .listing-subtitle {
    font-size: 0.85em !important;
    font-style: italic !important;
    margin-top: -5px !important;
    margin-bottom: 10px !important;
    display: block !important; /* Ensures it renders correctly */
  }

  /* Ensure buttons stay clean on hover without underlines */
  .blog-page .quarto-post .description a.btn:hover {
    text-decoration: none !important;
  }

  /* Force Subtitle INSIDE THE POST (Both Light & Dark) */
  .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-meta .subtitle,
  header.quarto-title-block .subtitle {
    font-size: 0.9em !important;
    font-style: italic !important;
    font-weight: 400 !important;
    margin-top: 5px !important;
  }

  main.content img, 
  .quarto-post .body img, 
  .quarto-figure img {
    border-radius: 25px !important; /* Larger rounding as requested */
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, filter 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }

  /* 2. Dark Mode Specifics (Cyborg) */
  body.quarto-dark main.content img,
  body.quarto-dark .quarto-figure img {
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) !important; /* Defines edge in darkness */
    filter: brightness(0.9); /* Dims slightly for eye comfort */
  }

  body.quarto-dark main.content img:hover,
  body.quarto-dark .quarto-figure img:hover {
    filter: brightness(1.05); /* Glows slightly on hover */
    transform: scale(1.01); 
  }

  /* 3. Light Mode Specifics (Cosmo) */
  body.quarto-light main.content img,
  body.quarto-light .quarto-figure img {
    border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08) !important; /* Soft depth */
  }

  body.quarto-light main.content img:hover,
  body.quarto-light .quarto-figure img:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 15px 35px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) !important; /* Shadow grows on hover */
    transform: scale(1.01);
  }

  .quarto-listing-category .category-count,
  .quarto-listing-category-count,
  .quarto-category-count,
  .category-count {
    display: none !important;
  }

  /* 2. Make the category keywords under the title smaller */
  .listing-categories .listing-category,
  .quarto-post .listing-categories .listing-category {
    font-size: 0.75em !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    font-style: italic !important;
    padding: 5px 10px !important;
    line-height: 1 !important;
    text-transform: none !important;
    opacity: 1 !important; 
  }

  /* 1. Moves the categories to the absolute right edge of the screen */
  /* 1. Stretch the parent container to the absolute edges of your screen */
  .blog-page #quarto-content.quarto-container {
    max-width: 100% !important; 
    margin: 5px !important;
    padding: 5px !important;
    display: flex !important; /* This allows side-by-side positioning */
    margin-right: 55px !important;
  }

  /* 2. Flush the blog content to the left edge */
  .blog-page main.content {
    margin-left: 4vw !important;  /* Give it a tiny 2% breathing room from the far left */
    max-width: 70% !important;    /* Control how wide the text spans */
    padding-left: 10px !important;
  }

  /* 3. Lock categories to the far right edge */
  .blog-page #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    position: fixed !important; 
    right: 3vw !important;       /* 2% distance from the absolute right edge */
    top: 100px !important; 
    width: 250px !important;
    font-size: 0.7em !important; /* Forced override for small text */
  }


  /* 3. Splits the blog post into 30% Image and 70% Text */
  .blog-page .quarto-post .thumbnail {
    flex-basis: 30% !important;
    max-width: 30% !important;
    padding-right: 5px;
  }
  
  .blog-page .quarto-post .body {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    flex-basis: 75% !important;
  }

  .blog-page .btn-sm {
    margin-right: 5px !important;
    margin-bottom: 5px !important;
    font-size: 0.75rem !important; /* Makes sure icons/text stay proportional */
  }

  /* --- GLOBAL STYLING --- */
  /* These rules apply to EVERY page (Home and Blog) */

  /* 1. LIGHT THEME (Normal & Hover) */
  body.quarto-light .advisor-link {
    color: #0056b3 !important;      /* Deep blue */
    text-decoration: none !important;
    border-bottom: none !important;
  }
  body.quarto-light .advisor-link:hover {
    text-decoration: underline !important;
    color: #004494 !important;      /* Slightly darker on hover */
  }

  /* 2. DARK THEME (Normal & Hover) */
  body.quarto-dark .advisor-link {
    color: #3498db !important;      /* Bright blue */
    text-decoration: none !important;
    border-bottom: none !important;
  }
  body.quarto-dark .advisor-link:hover {
    text-decoration: underline !important;
    color: #5dade2 !important;      /* Slightly lighter on hover */
  }

  /* Controls the appearance of post titles in lists */
  .listing-title {
    font-size: 1.2em !important;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .quarto-categories .quarto-category, 
  .quarto-title-meta .quarto-category,
  .quarto-title-meta-contents .quarto-category {
    font-size: 0.75em !important;
    font-style: italic !important;
    font-weight: 800 !important;
    padding: 5px 10px !important;
    line-height: 1 !important;
    text-transform: none !important;
    border-radius: 4px !important;
    display: inline-block !important;
    opacity: 1 !important; 
    color: inherit !important;
  }

  

  /* Ensures images in lists fill their containers properly */
  .quarto-post .thumbnail img {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: auto !important;
  }
</style>

language.appendix-attribution-cite-as: For attribution, please cite this work as:
